title: Knysna Art Society presents exhibition on human nature
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Art Society is set...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Art Society is set to showcase the creativity of its members in an upcoming art exhibition at the historic Old Gaol on Queen Street.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna Art Society is set to showcase the creativity of its members in an upcoming art exhibition at the historic Old Gaol on Queen Street."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Opening night is planned for 27 November, with the exhibition running for 10 days, offering art lovers a unique opportunity to explore a diverse range of works."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's theme, \"Human Nature\", invites artists to interpret the complexities, emotions and behaviours that define humanity.","html":"This year's theme, \"Human Nature\", invites artists to interpret the complexities, emotions and behaviours that define humanity."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From painting and sculpture to mixed media, visitors can expect to experience thought-provoking and visually striking pieces that reflect the varied perspectives of the society's talented members.","html":"From painting and sculpture to mixed media, visitors can expect to experience thought-provoking and visually striking pieces that reflect the varied perspectives of the society's talented members."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Old Gaol, a cultural landmark in Knysna, provides a fitting backdrop for this celebration of local art.","html":"The Old Gaol, a cultural landmark in Knysna, provides a fitting backdrop for this celebration of local art."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The exhibition promises to be an inspiring event for both seasoned art enthusiasts and the general public, encouraging dialogue about the human condition through creative expression.","html":"The exhibition promises to be an inspiring event for both seasoned art enthusiasts and the general public, encouraging dialogue about the human condition through creative expression."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Art lovers are encouraged to attend the opening night to meet the artists, view the works first-hand and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere.","html":"Art lovers are encouraged to attend the opening night to meet the artists, view the works first-hand and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Knysna Art Society presents exhibition on human nature
